title: Crunchyroll’s Biggest Shonen Jump Anime of The Year Reveals Dub Release
content: One of the most anticipated Shonen Jump anime of the year made its premiere this month as part of the Spring 2026 lineup. Marriagetoxin is an acclaimed Shonen Jump action series written by Joumyaku and illustrated by Mizuki Yoda.
author: ComicBook

title: Shonen Jump’s Hottest Series Is All Set For Anime Announcement After Latest Update
content: March 2026 was a major disappointment for Kagurabachi fans as the anime rumors were found to be groundless. The acclaimed Weekly Shonen Jump manga by Takeru Hokazono began serialization in September 2023 and immediately captured readers’ attention, becoming viral right after its first chapter.
author: ComicBook

title: Light Novel 'Around 40 Kenja no Isekai Seikatsu Nikki' Gets TV Anime
content: Production company Kadokawa opened an official website for a television anime adaptation of Yasukiyo Kotobuki 's Around 40 Kenja no Isekai Seikatsu Nikki ( The Diary of a Middle-Aged Sage's Carefree Life in Another World ) light novel on Wednesday, revealing the main staff and a teaser visual (pictured).
author: MyAnimeList

title: Acclaimed Fantasy Series’ Creator Returns With New Look At Fan-Favorite Character Ahead of Season 2
content: Warning: This article contains spoilers from the Yona of the Dawn manga! Kusanagi Mizuho’s beloved Yona of the Dawn manga reached its conclusion in December 2025 and returned with new side stories in February’s issue of Hakusensha’s Hana to Yume magazine.
author: ComicBook

title: The Diary of a Middle-Aged Sage's Carefree Life in Another World Novels Get Anime
content: Kadokawa announced on Wednesday that Yasukiyo Kotobuki 's The Diary of a Middle-Aged Sage's Carefree Life in Another World ( Arafō Kenja no Isekai Seikatsu Nikki ) light novels are getting a television anime.
author: ANN

title: Dragon Ball Super Exec Teases How Much Has Changed For New Remake
content: The franchise is all set to return this year with an exciting remake of the 2013 film Dragon Ball Z: Battle of Gods . The remake film, titled Dragon Ball Super: Beerus , is all set to premiere in October as part of the Fall 2026 anime lineup.
author: ComicBook

title: Studio Ghibli Returns With a Special New Anime in July
content: Even decades after its establishment in 1985, Studio Ghibli has remained the most iconic animation studio when it comes to anime movies. Every film produced by the studio is famous for its striking visuals, rich storytelling, and deep emotional impact.
author: ComicBook

title: Towa Ōshima's Kimi ga Loafer o Haitara Enters Climax in 5th Volume
content: The fourth compiled book volume of Towa Ōshima's Kimi ga Loafer o Haitara ( When you put on loafers ) manga revealed on April 16 that the manga will enter its climax with the manga's fifth volume.
author: ANN

title: Dragon Ball Super Confirms Frieza Remake With First Look
content: Dragon Ball kicked off 2026 with several exciting announcements during the Genki Dama Matsuri, an event held to commemorate the manga’s 40th anniversary. The anime will return this year with a remake film as part of the Fall 2026 season lineup and will retell the story of Dragon Ball Z: Battle of Gods .
author: ComicBook

title: Banjō Saitō's Genkai! Oshikatsu Densetsu Yoshio Manga Ends With 8th Volume
content: The seventh compiled book volume of Banjō Saitō 's Genkai! Oshikatsu Densetsu Yoshio manga revealed on April 10 that the manga will end in the manga's eighth volume in September.
author: ANN
